title: T-031 — UI: FIN-001 Finance Dashboard (fin_dashboard, §8.1, §8.3)
prompt:
# T-031 — FIN-001 Finance Dashboard UI

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.1 FIN-001; §8.3 dashboard widgets (8 widgets P1); §13.3 yield loss monthly query; §4.2 KPIs business; §4.1 dashboard load <2s P95.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/dashboard.jsx:1-215` (`fin_dashboard`)

## Goal
Server Component dashboard page `/finance` with 8 widgets per §8.3: KPI 6-card row (Total cost / Variance / Inventory value / WO pending close / DLQ open / Yield loss), Variance Alerts panel (top 10), Cost Breakdown bars, Waterfall MTD std vs actual, Trend chart 6 months, Top Variance Contributors table, Monthly Yield Loss table, Onboarding checklist (dismissable).

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/dashboard.jsx:1-215`.
shadcn primitives: Card, CardHeader, CardContent, Table, TableRow, TableCell, Badge, Button, Alert, Separator, Checkbox.
Reused components: KpiCard, CostBreakdownBars (T-020), WaterfallChart (T-020), TrendChart, RankBar (T-026), VarBadge (T-019), WoCostStatusBadge.
Parity checklist:
1. KPI 6-card row: Total Production Cost MTD (GBP), Variance MTD (GBP, signed), Inventory Value (GBP, method per finance_settings), WO Cost Pending Close (count), D365 DLQ Open (count, variant='destructive' when >0, click → /finance/d365?tab=dlq), Yield Loss Monthly (GBP from v_yield_loss_monthly T-024). Each card uses `<FinKpiCard>` with label/value/sub/accent/href.
2. Inline dismissable alerts (FIN_INLINE_ALERTS): persisted via Server Action dismissAlert(userId, alertCode) + user_preferences table.
3. Variance Alerts panel: top 10 by severity DESC + ABS(variance_pct) DESC; each row → Link to /finance/wos/[woId]/cost.
4. Cost Breakdown bars + Waterfall chart for MTD standard vs actual: reuses components from T-020.
5. Trend chart 6 months (3 series: material/labor/overhead) via Recharts LineChart.
6. Top Variance Contributors Table with RankBar (% of total).
7. Monthly Yield Loss Table: JOIN ncr_reports + v_yield_loss_monthly; EUR→GBP via exchange_rates per incident date.
8. Onboarding checklist (FIN_ONBOARD, dismissable): finance_onboarding_steps table per user; hidden when all complete.
9. Six independent data fetches via Promise.all in Server Component (KPIs, alerts, trend, contributors, breakdown, yield_loss).
10. RBAC: visible to `fin.wo_cost.view`; plant_director sees aggregate; prod_manager sees own line via RLS.

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/page.tsx` — RSC with Promise.all for 6 data sources; each Drizzle call wrapped in React.cache().
2. `app/finance/_components/fin-kpi-card.tsx` shared.
3. `app/finance/_components/dashboard-client.tsx` — client component for dismissable alerts + onboarding interactivity.
4. `app/finance/_components/trend-chart.tsx` shared (Recharts LineChart wrapper).
5. `app/finance/_actions/dashboard.ts` — Server Action `dismissAlert(alertCode)`.
6. `app/finance/_components/finance-onboarding-checklist.tsx`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/fin-kpi-card.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/dashboard-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/trend-chart.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/finance-onboarding-checklist.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_actions/dashboard.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/__tests__/dashboard-client.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/__tests__/fin-kpi-card.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given dashboard renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/dashboard.jsx:1-215, then 8 widgets match — RTL snapshot + parity checklist. AND given Trend chart loads, when SVG scraped, then 3 series (material/labor/overhead) with 6 monthly points.
- Given DLQ Open count > 0, when KPI card renders, then variant='destructive' and click routes to /finance/d365?tab=dlq. AND given user clicks 'Dismiss' on an inline alert, when Server Action commits, then user_preferences.dismissed_alerts contains the alert_id.
- Given onboarding 5 steps complete, when page renders, then checklist Card not present. AND given Variance Alerts row clicked, when nav finishes, then URL=/finance/wos/[woId]/cost.
- Given dashboard load measured (Lighthouse/Web Vitals), then <2s P95 under typical Apex load. AND given user lacks fin.wo_cost.view, when page renders, then forbidden page returned.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 9→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: dashboard-client.test.tsx asserts parity + dismiss flow + Trend chart series count + onboarding hidden when all complete + Variance Alerts row click. fin-kpi-card.test.tsx asserts variant mapping + href routing.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/_components`.
- Lighthouse audit captured in closeout (target <2s P95).

## Risk red lines
- Do not block the page load on the slowest data source — use streaming RSC (Suspense boundaries per widget).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not skip the 5min / 15min cache hints per widget (per §8.3).
- Do not use HTML `<table>` directly (use shadcn Table for accessibility).
- Do not hardcode currency='GBP' — read from finance_settings.
- Do not skip the destructive variant on DLQ KPI when > 0 — operator must see it.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe).

pipeline_inputs.description: FIN-001 Finance Dashboard with 8 widgets per §8.3, dismissable alerts persisted in user_preferences, 6 parallel data fetches, reused KpiCard + Trend + Waterfall + RankBar primitives.
